subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath manifested from the Ocean of Utterance the pearls of wisdom and exposition. He is the Sovereign Who hath raised up [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اظهر من بحر البیان لئالی الحکمه و التبیان هو المالک الذی نصبت
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @unity; oneness of humanity
